sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 2.5g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. fat is basically not the story here.
sections.subtitleText: 2.5g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. fat is basically not the story here.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 72g of carbs. fibre is doing a lot of the work here. for grains, the carb quality matters much more than the raw number.
sections.subtitleText: 72g of carbs. fibre is doing a lot of the work here. for grains, the carb quality matters much more than the raw number.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 13.2g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. protein helps, but not enough if the carb side is weak.
sections.subtitleText: 13.2g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. protein helps, but not enough if the carb side is weak.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: outside of that, the profile is pretty quiet.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: magnesium at 34% daily value, iron at 20% daily value, zinc at 20% daily value stand out most. useful, but still not a major mineral edge.
sections.subtitleText: magnesium at 34% daily value, iron at 20% daily value, zinc at 20% daily value stand out most. useful, but still not a major mineral edge.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first: can keep meals cheap and steady. that is a genuine category strength. works as a meal anchor. a lot of value comes from being easy to build around. easy to batch cook at scale. that practicality is part of why grains matter.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides: carb load is still the main burden. that is the category risk no grain fully escapes. quality can drop fast with processing. the grain category punishes refinement pretty hard. needs strong pairings to feel complete. the grain rarely finishes the nutrition job alone.

closing.summary: Whole Wheat has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best when you want a staple carb that actually brings something useful with it.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when you want a staple carb that actually brings something useful with it.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?

explanation.summary: Proteins are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in A tier.
